textPlain: Monkey-patching is altering the code at runtime, not the source code, so from the "alternative to forking and modifying" part it doesn't sound like an alternative to that.Edit: okay Readme is clear on it and the description does make sense, the short description here just confused me.
This is a nice system. I wonder if modshim can be used to or extended to do hot reload.
I ported the clojure bond library over to python. It’s not quite as neat as the original, but IMO the pseudo-FP style is much more ergonomic.https://github.com/epgui/pybond
